concerns.detail: Identifies a specific student by ethnicity and degree program (Middle Eastern MPhil) and accuses them of application fraud, which constitutes sensitive personal information about a private individual.
concerns.excerpt: 中东的Mphi申请材料作假不escalate上去就很体面人了

concerns.detail: Removes mention of 'mixed evaluation' (评价比较两面) regarding academic level, replacing it with purely positive praise about cultivating influential scholars, potentially suppressing substantive legitimate criticism of the advisor.
concerns.excerpt: 我觉得创的评价比较两面，学术水平
